use_cases: Display customer testimonials with star ratings on landing pages
Showcase product reviews in e-commerce product listings
Present social proof and user feedback in SaaS marketing sections
Highlight ratings in review and testimonial sections
ai_summary: A review card component displaying user testimonials with avatar, name, handle, star rating, and review text. Built with shadcn/ui styling conventions and includes framer-motion entrance animation on mount. Uses semantic HTML with ARIA attributes for accessibility. Designed for showcasing customer feedback and social proof across landing pages, product listings, and marketing sections.
